name: Altair Engineering Inc.
h1: Altair Engineering's GCC footprint in India
lede: Altair Engineering runs four capability centers across four Indian cities. Bengaluru, Chennai, New Delhi and Pune, covering engineering & design, gbs, it and sales & marketing, built over eight years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Altair Engineering office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Altair Engineering Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Altair Engineering runs 4 verified GCC centers across 4 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, New Delhi, Pune), covering engineering & design, gbs, it and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

titles.title: Director Sales - APAC & GCC , Appliance and Cloud Solutions

about.description: Altair Engineering's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Chennai, New Delhi and Pune, spanning engineering & design, gbs, it and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Engineering, Scientific and CAD Software, Industry-Specific Software

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 41 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Altair Engineering operate in India?
faq.a: Altair Engineering operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Altair Engineering have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Altair Engineering's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Chennai, New Delhi and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Altair Engineering run in India?
faq.a: Altair Engineering runs engineering & design, gbs, it and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Altair Engineering's India GCCs?
faq.a: Altair Engineering's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Altair Engineering's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 41 leaders at Altair Engineering's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
